items.title: Uni-verse
items.subtitle: AI-Powered University Discovery Platform
items.description: Developed a data-driven platform acknowledged by technology CEOs for bridging information gaps for thousands of prospective students. Engineered an intelligent matching algorithm using SQLAlchemy to filter program combinations based on academic qualifications and financial data. Architected a high-performance backend with Flask and PostgreSQL optimized for multi-variable relational queries.

items.title: p2pdocs
items.subtitle: Decentralized Real-time Collaborative Editor
items.description: Engineered a serverless editing platform utilizing CRDT (RGA) algorithms for guaranteed state convergence across decentralized nodes. Built a thread-safe hybrid networking layer (UDP/TCP) for automated peer discovery and reliable low-latency synchronization on local networks. Published a zero-dependency package on PyPI, featuring locking mechanisms for concurrent UI and network operations.

items.title: Sénior
items.subtitle: Workflow-Automated Mentorship Ecosystem
items.description: Scaled an academic platform using a State-Driven Architecture (Verification → Match → Completion) to connect juniors with verified mentors. Integrated Brevo API for automated scheduling and transactional alerts, reducing manual administrative overhead by 90%. Designed a responsive React 18 frontend with admin verification gates to ensure ecosystem integrity.

items.title: Guardian
items.subtitle: Mission-Critical Student Safety Portal
items.description: Developed a secure communication hub for 400+ users, integrating Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for emergency data protection. Utilized Google Sheets API as a live, dynamic backend for real-time updates without the need for code redeployment. Engineered an admin-controlled Emergency Mode to override privacy filters and expose critical details during city-wide crises.
